page_metadata.biotools__summary: easyMF is a web platform for matrix factorization-based biological discovery from large-scale transcriptome data. easyMF comprises three functional modules, named Matrix Preparation, Matrix Factorization, and Deep Mining. Deep Mining includes Metagene-based Deep Mining Using Amplitude Matrix and Metagene-based Deep Mining Using Pattern Matrix.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: easyMF is a web platform for matrix factorization-based biological discovery from large-scale transcriptome data. easyMF comprises three functional modules, named Matrix Preparation, Matrix Factorization, and Deep Mining.
